de.uka.ilkd.key.control

Interface UserInterfaceControl

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl, AbstractUserInterfaceControl, ConsoleUserInterfaceControl, DefaultUserInterfaceControl, WindowUserInterfaceControl

    public interface UserInterfaceControl
    Provides the user interface independent logic to manage multiple proofs. This includes:
    • Functionality to load files via #load(Profile, File, List, File, Properties, boolean).
    • Functionality to instantiate new Proofs via createProof(InitConfig, ProofOblInput).
    • Functionality to register existing Proofs in the user interface via registerProofAggregate(ProofAggregate).
    • Access to the ProofControl via getProofControl().
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addProverTaskListener(ProverTaskListener ptl)
      Registers the given ProverTaskListener which will be informed about all events.
      Proof createProof(InitConfig initConfig, ProofOblInput input)
      Instantiates a new Proof in this UserInterfaceControl for the given ProofOblInput based on the InitConfig.
      ProofControl getProofControl()
      Returns the used ProofControl.
      TermLabelVisibilityManager getTermLabelVisibilityManager()
      Returns the TermLabelVisibilityManager.
      AbstractProblemLoader load(Profile profile, File file, List<File> classPaths, File bootClassPath, List<File> includes, Properties poPropertiesToForce, boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs)
      Opens a java file in this UserInterfaceControl and returns the instantiated AbstractProblemLoader which can be used to instantiated proofs programmatically.
      void registerProofAggregate(ProofAggregate pa)
      Registers an already created ProofAggregate in this UserInterfaceControl.
      void removeProverTaskListener(ProverTaskListener ptl)
      Removes the given ProverTaskListener.

    • Method Detail

      • addProverTaskListener

        void addProverTaskListener(ProverTaskListener ptl)
        Registers the given ProverTaskListener which will be informed about all events.
        Parameters:
        ptl - The ProverTaskListener to add.

      • removeProverTaskListener

        void removeProverTaskListener(ProverTaskListener ptl)
        Removes the given ProverTaskListener.
        Parameters:
        ptl - The ProverTaskListener to remove.

      • load

        AbstractProblemLoader load(Profile profile,
                         File file,
                         List<File> classPaths,
                         File bootClassPath,
                         List<File> includes,
                         Properties poPropertiesToForce,
                         boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs)
                           throws ProblemLoaderException

        Opens a java file in this UserInterfaceControl and returns the instantiated AbstractProblemLoader which can be used to instantiated proofs programmatically.

        The loading is performed in the Thread of the caller!

        Parameters:
        profile - An optional Profile to use. If it is null the default profile KeYMediator#getDefaultProfile() is used.
        file - The java file to open.
        classPaths - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        poPropertiesToForce - Some optional Properties for the PO which extend or overwrite saved PO Properties.
        forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true #profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
        Returns:
        The opened AbstractProblemLoader.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.

      • createProof

        Proof createProof(InitConfig initConfig,
                ProofOblInput input)
                  throws ProofInputException
        Instantiates a new Proof in this UserInterfaceControl for the given ProofOblInput based on the InitConfig.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - The InitConfig which provides the source code.
        input - The description of the Proof to instantiate.
        Returns:
        The instantiated Proof.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • registerProofAggregate

        void registerProofAggregate(ProofAggregate pa)
        Registers an already created ProofAggregate in this UserInterfaceControl.
        Parameters:
        pa - The ProofAggregate to register.

      • getProofControl

        ProofControl getProofControl()
        Returns the used ProofControl.
        Returns:
        The used ProofControl.

      • getTermLabelVisibilityManager

        TermLabelVisibilityManager getTermLabelVisibilityManager()
        Returns the TermLabelVisibilityManager.
        Returns:
        The TermLabelVisibilityManager.
